**Section VII SUPPLEMENT**

**Edit Rule Number:**

> Ending Budgetary Account Balance **Rule Name:**

The sum of the pre-closing ending balance of USSGL 4000-series accounts must equal zero for each reported **Description:**

**Section VII**

TAS.

SZ: USSGL / Zero Equal (=) **Type: Operand:**

01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08, 09, 10, 11, 12 **Fatal Period:**

## **U.S. Standard General Ledger Data Edits - Detail Report**

**Edit Rule Number:** 96

**SUPPLEMENT**

**Rule Name:** Discretionary Gross Outlays From New Authority Versus Discretionary Gross Budget Authority

**Description:** Discretionary gross outlays from new authority (SF 133 line 4010) should not exceed the discretionary gross budget

authority (SF 133 line 4000 minus anticipated amounts). If this instance is caused by a reduction of unobligated balances,

**Section VII**

submit a GTAS override.

**Type:** LN: Statement Line / Statement Line

**Operand:** Less Than Or Equal (<=)

**Fatal Period:** 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08, 09, 10, 11, 12

**Edit Rule Number:** 187

**Rule Name:** GTAS RSNC Purchase of assets offset (RC 24) line : GINV Buyer Offsets

**Description:** RSNC Purchase of assets offset (RC 24) line must equal RC 24 - Purchase of Assets Offset

**Type:** LS: Statement Line / SMAF

**Operand:** Equal (=)

**Fatal Period:**

**Proposed Analytical**  01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08, 09, 10, 11, 12

| Left Side Attribute Combination |                                  |         | Right Side Attribute Combination |  |  |
|---------------------------------|----------------------------------|---------|----------------------------------|--|--|
| Statement<br>Line Number        |                                  | Operand | G-Invoicing                      |  |  |
| Reclassified Statement of       | 11.3 - Purchase of assets offset | +       | BUYER_OFFSETS                    |  |  |
| Net Cost                        | (RC 24) / 2                      |         |                                  |  |  |

### **U.S. Standard General Ledger Data Edits - Detail Report**

**Edit Rule Number:** 188

|---------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------|--------------------|--|
| Statement                       | Line Number                                                | Operand                          | G-Invoicing        |  |
| Balance Sheet                   | 3.4 - Accounts receivable, net<br>(RC 22)                  | +                                | SELLER_RECEIVABLES |  |
| Balance Sheet                   | 6.3 - Other Assets -<br>Reimbursable Activities (RC<br>22) | +                                |                    |  |

of fiscal year including adjustments as noted in edit.

### **U.S. Standard General Ledger Data Edits - Detail Report**

**Edit Rule Number:** 220

**Rule Name:** Gross Outlays from Balances Versus Unexpended Balances Start of Fiscal Year

**Description:** Gross outlays from balances (SF133 lines 4011 and 4101) should not exceed the unobligated and obligated balances start

of fiscal year including adjustments as noted in edit.

**Type:** LN: Statement Line / Statement Line

**Operand:** Less Than Or Equal (<=)

**Fatal Period:** 01, 02, 03, 04, 05, 06, 07, 08, 09, 10, 11, 12

**Proposed Analytical**
